blockingIssues.description: src/hud/index.ts calls initializeHUDState() before resolving cwd and without passing the resolved project directory, so HUD cleanup can still target process.cwd() instead of the intended worktree path.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Ensure mission feature metadata references only installed skills (or ship required mission-specific skills like `bugfix-worker` before scheduling workers).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker transcript for feature fix-critical-logic-bugs reports `Error: Skill "bugfix-worker" not found`, and the worker handoff explicitly documents procedure deviation due to missing skill.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align feature-level `verificationSteps` with mission-level CI policy by always including lint when mission AGENTS mandates lint.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS requires lint in CI gates, but fix-critical-logic-bugs verificationSteps in features.json list only vitest, tsc, and build.

rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous - no repository-local schema or baseline content was available in this branch, so adding files directly risked introducing incorrect shared-state format.
